findings.message: New scrape job 'redis' added with no corresponding alert rule file. Prometheus scrape jobs should have matching alert rules defined.
findings.suggestion: Create infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/redis.yml with alert rules for monitoring redis-exporter metrics (e.g., redis up status, memory usage, connection limits).
